world.name: World Overview (L0全球底图)
world.description: Global baseline containing continental outlines, major water bodies, and national borders (Zoom 0-5) in space-efficient PNG format.

china.name: China Overview (L1国家概况图)
china.description: National coverage containing provincial borders, capital hubs, and critical transport arteries (Zoom 6-8) in Raster PNG format.

liaoning.name: Liaoning Overview (L2省级概况图)
liaoning.description: Provincial overview showing geocoded city centers, expressways, provincial highways, railways, and primary river systems (Zoom 9-11) in Raster PNG format.

dandong.name: Dandong Detail (L3市级详细图)
dandong.description: City-level detail maps showing secondary transit tracks, county grids, national roads, and surrounding topographic layers (Zoom 12-16) in Raster PNG format.

zhenxing_hd.name: Zhenxing UHD (L4三级超精细图)
zhenxing_hd.description: Ultra-dense detailed street grids, riverfront boardwalks, community alleys, and POI elevations for Zhenxing urban core (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.

yuanbao_hd.name: Yuanbao UHD (L4三级超精细图)
yuanbao_hd.description: Ultra-dense street blocks, tourist pathways, local residential buildings, and historical park topologies for Yuanbao district (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.

zhenan_hd.name: Zhenan UHD (L4三级超精细图)
zhenan_hd.description: Ultra-dense transport connections, mountain passes, local industry sites, and rural tracks across suburban Zhenan district (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.

donggang_hd.name: Donggang UHD (L4三级超精细图)
donggang_hd.description: Ultra-dense coverage of Donggang coastal zone, port structures, shoreline grids, and primary seafood agricultural corridors (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.

fengcheng_hd.name: Fengcheng UHD (L4三级超精细图)
fengcheng_hd.description: Ultra-dense mountain trail systems, rail pathways, county roads, and local towns across Fengcheng mountainous boundaries (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.

kuandian_hd.name: Kuandian UHD (L4三级超精细图)
kuandian_hd.description: Ultra-dense forestry grids, reservoir shorelines, ecological nature preserves, and remote mountain access paths in Kuandian Manchu Autonomous County (Zoom 17-20) in space-saving PNG8.
